title: Galatin
summary: Galatin (Bulgarian: Галатин) is a village located in northwestern Bulgaria. It is a part of Krivodol Municipality, Vratsa Province.
text:
Galatin (Bulgarian: Галатин) is a village located in northwestern Bulgaria. It is a part of Krivodol Municipality, Vratsa Province.

Geography
The village is located approximately 26 kilometers to the north of town of Vratsa and 7 kilometers from the town of Krividol. It lie at the both banks of a nameless streamlet, but the native people call it "Bara" (Bulgarian: Бара), 'streamlet'. Neighbouring Galatin are the villages of Devene (East), Osen (Southeast), Lesura (North), and Tri kladentsi (Northeast), Baurene (Northwest), and the town of Krivodol (Southwest).
